generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this report that 68% of NATO allies aren't meeting their defense spending commitments. Meanwhile, our own preparedness programs are getting cut. How can we expect strong deterrence when partners won't pull their weight? Time to rethink these alliances before they become liabilities. #NationalSecurityFirst
